title: Algebra I (EOC)
description: Linear functions, systems, exponents, polynomials, quadratics, and exponential functions for the Algebra I End-of-Course exam.

lessons.title: Slope from two points

lessons.title: Write equations in slope-intercept form
lessons.objective: Write linear equations in slope-intercept form (y = mx + b) given two points or a slope and a point.

questions.prompt: Write the equation of the line through (4, 4) and (7, 7) in slope-intercept form. What is the y-intercept b?
questions.explanation: Slope m = 1. Use y = mx + b: 4 = 1(4) + b → b = 0 = 0.

questions.explanation: Slope m = 0. Use y = mx + b: 4 = 0(-5) + b → b = 4 = 4.

lessons.title: Systems by substitution
lessons.objective: Solve systems of two linear equations by substitution.

questions.prompt:
Solve the system by substitution:
  y = 3x − 11
  1x + 2y = 20
Find y.
questions.explanation: Substitute y = 3x − 11 into 1x + 2y = 20, solve to get x = 6, y = 7.

questions.prompt:
Solve the system by substitution:
  y = -4x + 1
  4x + 1y = 1
Find x.
questions.explanation: Substitute y = -4x + 1 into 4x + 1y = 1, solve to get x = 2, y = -7.

lessons.title: Multiply polynomials
lessons.objective: Multiply polynomials of degree one and two using FOIL and distribution.

questions.prompt: Expand (x + 5)(x + 4). What is the coefficient of x in the expanded form?
questions.explanation: Use FOIL: x·x + x·4 + 5·x + 5·4 = x² + 9x + 20. The coefficient of x is 9.

questions.prompt: Expand (x − 3)(x + 5). What is the coefficient of x in the expanded form?
questions.explanation: Use FOIL: x·x + x·5 + -3·x + -3·5 = x² + 2x + -15. The coefficient of x is 2.

questions.prompt: Expand (x − 5)(x + 9). What is the coefficient of x in the expanded form?
questions.explanation: Use FOIL: x·x + x·9 + -5·x + -5·9 = x² + 4x + -45. The coefficient of x is 4.

questions.prompt: Expand (x + 6)(x + 6). What is the coefficient of x in the expanded form?
questions.explanation: Use FOIL: x·x + x·6 + 6·x + 6·6 = x² + 12x + 36. The coefficient of x is 12.

questions.prompt: Expand (x + 9)(x − 5). What is the coefficient of x in the expanded form?
questions.explanation: Use FOIL: x·x + x·-5 + 9·x + 9·-5 = x² + 4x + -45. The coefficient of x is 4.

questions.prompt: Expand (x − 3)(x − 6). What is the coefficient of x in the expanded form?
questions.explanation: Use FOIL: x·x + x·-6 + -3·x + -3·-6 = x² + -9x + 18. The coefficient of x is -9.

questions.prompt: Expand (x − 8)(x + 6). What is the coefficient of x in the expanded form?
questions.explanation: Use FOIL: x·x + x·6 + -8·x + -8·6 = x² + -2x + -48. The coefficient of x is -2.

questions.prompt: Expand (x + 6)(x + 4). What is the coefficient of x in the expanded form?
questions.explanation: Use FOIL: x·x + x·4 + 6·x + 6·4 = x² + 10x + 24. The coefficient of x is 10.

questions.prompt: Expand (x + 4)(x + 9). What is the coefficient of x in the expanded form?
questions.explanation: Use FOIL: x·x + x·9 + 4·x + 4·9 = x² + 13x + 36. The coefficient of x is 13.

questions.prompt: Expand (x − 9)(x + 1). What is the coefficient of x in the expanded form?
questions.explanation: Use FOIL: x·x + x·1 + -9·x + -9·1 = x² + -8x + -9. The coefficient of x is -8.

questions.prompt: Expand (x + 9)(x − 7). What is the coefficient of x in the expanded form?
questions.explanation: Use FOIL: x·x + x·-7 + 9·x + 9·-7 = x² + 2x + -63. The coefficient of x is 2.

questions.prompt: Expand (x + 6)(x − 9). What is the coefficient of x in the expanded form?
questions.explanation: Use FOIL: x·x + x·-9 + 6·x + 6·-9 = x² + -3x + -54. The coefficient of x is -3.

questions.prompt: Expand (x − 8)(x + 9). What is the coefficient of x in the expanded form?
questions.explanation: Use FOIL: x·x + x·9 + -8·x + -8·9 = x² + 1x + -72. The coefficient of x is 1.

questions.prompt: Expand (x + 7)(x − 5). What is the coefficient of x in the expanded form?
questions.explanation: Use FOIL: x·x + x·-5 + 7·x + 7·-5 = x² + 2x + -35. The coefficient of x is 2.

questions.prompt: Expand (x − 6)(x − 7). What is the coefficient of x in the expanded form?
questions.explanation: Use FOIL: x·x + x·-7 + -6·x + -6·-7 = x² + -13x + 42. The coefficient of x is -13.

questions.prompt: Expand (x − 4)(x − 8). What is the coefficient of x in the expanded form?

lessons.objective: Factor trinomials of the form x² + bx + c, including those with leading coefficient 1.

questions.explanation: Find two numbers whose product is 7 and sum is 8: 7 and 1. So x² + 8x + 7 = (x + 7)(x + 1).

questions.prompt: Factor: x² + 10x + 16
questions.explanation: Find two numbers whose product is 16 and sum is 10: 8 and 2. So x² + 10x + 16 = (x + 8)(x + 2).

questions.prompt: Factor: x² − 11x + 30
questions.explanation: Find two numbers whose product is 30 and sum is -11: -5 and -6. So x² − 11x + 30 = (x − 5)(x − 6).

questions.prompt: Factor: x² − 7x + 6
questions.explanation: Find two numbers whose product is 6 and sum is -7: -1 and -6. So x² − 7x + 6 = (x − 1)(x − 6).

questions.prompt: Factor: x² + 8x + 15
questions.explanation: Find two numbers whose product is 15 and sum is 8: 5 and 3. So x² + 8x + 15 = (x + 5)(x + 3).

questions.prompt: Factor: x² − 10x + 21
questions.explanation: Find two numbers whose product is 21 and sum is -10: -7 and -3. So x² − 10x + 21 = (x − 7)(x − 3).

questions.prompt: Factor: x² − 4x + 3
questions.explanation: Find two numbers whose product is 3 and sum is -4: -3 and -1. So x² − 4x + 3 = (x − 3)(x − 1).

questions.prompt: Factor: x² + 5x − 6
questions.explanation: Find two numbers whose product is -6 and sum is 5: -1 and 6. So x² + 5x − 6 = (x − 1)(x + 6).

questions.prompt: Factor: x² − 2x − 8
questions.explanation: Find two numbers whose product is -8 and sum is -2: -4 and 2. So x² − 2x − 8 = (x − 4)(x + 2).

questions.prompt: Factor: x² + 0x − 36
questions.explanation: Find two numbers whose product is -36 and sum is 0: 6 and -6. So x² + 0x − 36 = (x + 6)(x − 6).

questions.prompt: Factor: x² + 0x − 49
questions.explanation: Find two numbers whose product is -49 and sum is 0: 7 and -7. So x² + 0x − 49 = (x + 7)(x − 7).

questions.prompt: Factor: x² − 3x − 4
questions.explanation: Find two numbers whose product is -4 and sum is -3: -4 and 1. So x² − 3x − 4 = (x − 4)(x + 1).

questions.prompt: Factor: x² − 9x + 14
questions.explanation: Find two numbers whose product is 14 and sum is -9: -2 and -7. So x² − 9x + 14 = (x − 2)(x − 7).

questions.prompt: Factor: x² − 6x − 16
questions.explanation: Find two numbers whose product is -16 and sum is -6: -8 and 2. So x² − 6x − 16 = (x − 8)(x + 2).
